song.title: I Lift My Eyes Up
song.author: Psalm 121:1-2
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C F C F I lift my eyes up, unto the mountains. .C F C G G7 Where does my help come from? .C F My help comes from You, .C F Maker of heaven, .C F C G Creator of the earth.
[V2] .C F C Oh, how I need You Lord. . F C You are my only hope. . F C G You are my only prayer. .C F So I will wait for You .C F To come and rescue me, .C F C G To come and give me life.
